seo.title: Pricing — Automation Sprint tiers
seo.description: Transparent Automation Sprint pricing from $4,500–$26,000. Pilot, Standard, and Mid-Market tiers. Blueprint from $2,500. Fixed scope, fixed price.

hero.headline: Fixed scope. Fixed price. No surprise AI bills.
hero.subheadline: Sprint engagements typically range $4,500–$26,000 by tier. Blueprint de-risks the quote before full build.

intro: Pricing filters tire-kickers and aligns expectations. Every sprint includes one workflow, written AI spend cap, and 3–6 week delivery.

tiers.name: Pilot
tiers.idealFor: Single high-friction workflow; first automation with Bekur
includes: Hard monthly AI cap in scope

tiers.name: Mid-Market
tiers.idealFor: Higher complexity logic, more approval branches, larger firms
includes: One complex workflow with exception handling

blueprintNote.headline: Not sure which tier?
blueprintNote.body: Start with Blueprint ($2,500 tier). You'll get a logic map and a fixed sprint quote before committing to build.

disclaimer: Final quote depends on workflow complexity surfaced in Logic Mapping. We do not bill open-ended hours.
